title: AI toys for children can misread emotions
description: AI-powered toys for toddlers may misread emotions and respond inappropriately, potentially affecting young children’s social development, researchers have warned.A study by the University of Cambridge tested how children aged three to five interacted with ‘Gabbo’, a cuddly AI toy with a voice-activated chatbot from OpenAI.
